name: SBG REQUEST BOT!!?
description:
HEY, HEY, HEY!!! HI GUYS i made ANOTHER BUT IT'S DIFFERENT THIS IS FOR REQUEST IN SBG OF COURSE!!!

So, i was running out of ideas and i decided how about to make a request bot so i can hear out to my others! so i promise to make it! it i'm letting it to be any type of story you guys want! it can be enemies to lovers friends to lovers trope! or other types! so let your imagination go wild!! and also i do not want to steal your guys credit so if i made one that is from you guys i will put your name and show who is really the one who made this i don't like stealing other credits because it's awful!!

THIS IS ME!!! GOING OUT GOODBYE!
creator: Lorelei_•♥
